summary.headline: Bunge Global SA completed the sale and issuance of $650 million aggregate principal amount of 4.550% Senior Notes due 2030 and $650 million aggregate principal amount of 5.150% Senior Notes due 2035.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge Global SA, through its wholly-owned finance subsidiary Bunge Limited Finance Corp., completed the sale and issuance of two series of senior notes totaling $1.3 billion. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Bunge Limited Finance Corp. issued $650 million aggregate principal amount of 4.550% Senior Notes due 2030 and $650 million aggregate principal amount of 5.150% Senior Notes due 2035, guaranteed by Bunge Global SA.

extraction_notes: Numbers are in millions of USD; cover sheet only had Item references, details from Exhibit 1.1.
